ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compression_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the compression algorithm (e.g., JPEG, JPEG 2000) */,
  "algorithm_description" TEXT /* Description of the compression algorithm */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the compression algorithm */,
  "algorithm_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor or developer of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_complexity" INTEGER /* Complexity rating (1-5) to indicate the computational resources required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distortion_types" (
  "distortion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distortion type */,
  "distortion_name" TEXT /* Name of the distortion type (e.g., Blur, Fast Fading) */,
  "distortion_description" TEXT /* Description of the distortion type */,
  "distortion_intensity" REAL /* Intensity level of the distortion */,
  "distortion_effect" TEXT /* Brief description of the effect the distortion has on the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distortion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the test image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the test image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the test image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "image_aspect_ratio" TEXT /* Aspect ratio of the image (e.g., 16:9) */,
  "image_md5" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the image to ensure integrity and uniqueness */,
  "image_color_space" TEXT /* Color space of the image (e.g., RGB, CMYK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quality metric */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compression algorithm */,
  "distortion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distortion type */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test image */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric for the given combination */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation session to which this result belongs */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES compression_algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_distortion_id FOREIGN KEY ("distortion_id") REFERENCES distortion_types ("distortion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES test_images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES evaluation_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compression_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression setting */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compression algorithm */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of setting (e.g., quality, compression ratio) */,
  "setting_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the setting value (e.g., dB, %) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_settings_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES compression_algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES evaluation_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_image_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test image */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the test image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the test image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "capture_device" TEXT /* Device used to capture the test image */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date the test image was captured */,
  "image_brightness" REAL /* Average brightness of the image */,
  "image_contrast" REAL /* Contrast level of the image */,
  "image_sharpness" REAL /* Sharpness of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_image_metadata_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES test_images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "session_leader" TEXT /* Name of the session leader */,
  "session_participants" TEXT /* List of participants in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)
